title: Authorization for other branch experiment stations
doc_html:
§1062.  Authorization for other branch experiment stations

The Board of Supervisors of Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College may establish branch experiment stations at such places and for such purposes as it deems necessary to best serve the agricultural and livestock interests of Louisiana.
doc_text:
§1062.  Authorization for other branch experiment stations
The Board of Supervisors of Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College may establish branch experiment stations at such places and for such purposes as it deems necessary to best serve the agricultural and livestock interests of Louisiana.
